title: polypodium pleurosorum
intro: Polypodium pleurosorum, also known as Pleurosorus, is a type of fern plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polypodium pleurosorum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to relieve colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
